creator: nivit@FreeBSD.org
text:
At this point, I think we could create an indipendent port as Arch Linux has:

https://aur.archlinux.org/packages?O=0&SeB=nd&K=gladtex&outdated=&SB=p&SO=d&PP=50&submit=Go

Maybe with a name such as graphics/py-gladtex, since it can be used like a Python library too.

What do you think? In case, do you want to take its maintainership?
